resources.string:
For ethical, legal, and technical reasons, this app does not come bundled with the CrossCode game files. But there is a way you can add them yourself!
This in-app guide will show you how.

You'll need a PC or Laptop with internet and a cable to connect your phone.

The game files are going to be placed in your phones storage. In order to execute them later, this app needs your permission to access this storage.\n\nClick on the button and confirm the permission to proceed.
Step Two: Install CCLoader and the cc-font-fix mod

Next, we have install the modloader named CCLoader.
Follow the instructions on:
https://wiki.c2dl.info/CCLoader

Then, install the mod to fix an issue with the game font:
https://github.com/krypciak/cc-font-fix
Step Three: Copy the game directory onto your phone

Copy the "CrossCode" main directory onto your phone to a folder:
Android/data/de.radicalfishgames.crosscode/files

Make sure the following path exists:
Android/data/de.radicalfishgames.crosscode/files/CrossCode/assets
Disable overlay automatically during cutscenes, conversations and Direct Links
Set the transparency of the overlay from 0 (fully visible) to 100 (fully invisible)
Paste a Save String here, and it will be imported to the game when it next starts (one at a time only)
Select a save file and it will be imported to the game when it next starts (one at a time only)
Display a dialog with the Save String of the latest Save on game start
Vibrate when the screen shakes in-game
Enable this to always run as fast as possible, no matter where you touch the movement pad.
Only dash when the dash area is tapped (not swiped into) to avoid dashing by accident
Always use the virtual controller, even when a physical controller is connected.
